overall.description: A stationary first-person view from inside a futuristic cyberpunk apartment looking out a panoramic window at a sprawling dystopian cityscape with towering megastructures. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring high-fidelity cinematic rendering with cool blue-toned lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom looking out through a panoramic window at a sprawling futuristic city. The interior features exposed brick walls and an unmade bed, while outside a massive mega-tower dominates the skyline. Flying vehicles traverse the sky at two points during the clip, adding motion to the otherwise still scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a cyberpunk bedroom that looks out upon a sprawling, futuristic metropolis. It begins within the intimate confines of the apartment, where the camera captures the contrast between the gritty interior of exposed brick and an unmade bed against the scale of the city outside. As the gaze lingers on the panoramic window, the massive silhouette of a mega-tower dominates the skyline under cool, blue-toned lighting. The stillness of the scene is then punctuated by the rhythmic passage of flying vehicles traversing the sky, adding a sense of kinetic energy to the dystopian vista.
